title: Etsy core marketplace GMS increases in Q1 through mobile, AI growth
text: Etsy's core marketplace achieved meaningful GMS growth in Q1 2026, with $2.46 billion in GMS representing a 5.5% year-over-year increase. This marks the second consecutive quarter of marketplace GMS growth, representing a turnaround from the extended period of declines that characterized 2024 and early 2025. Mobile contributed significantly to the growth, with app GMS up 11.2% year-over-year and mobile app transactions accounting for approximately 47% of total GMS. The recovery reflects the successful impact of Etsy's strategic initiatives, particularly AI-driven personalization and search improvements. Etsy's investments in generative AI for search ranking and item discovery have enhanced buyer experience, with personalized homepages yielding nearly double the engagement compared to non-personalized versions. Agentic commerce partnerships with ChatGPT, Google, and Microsoft have also contributed, with agentic traffic up fifteenfold year-over-year. The company's focus on improving search relevance, reducing single-seller dominance in results, and implementing better matching algorithms has contributed to the return to growth.
